creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

To submitter: the source of this data is external to FreeBSD.  It appears 
that one of the two sources used has the correct information, and the other 
is incorrect.  Please can you follow the instructions at the top of this 
incorrect source (http://members.datafast.net.au/dft0802/downloads/pcidevs.txt) 
in order to get it fixed upstream?  I'm marking this PR as suspended, as 
it'll get fixed automatically on the next vendor import once corrected 
upstream.
